title: Workspace publish, readme rendering, and manifest metadata

source.subject: feat(server): workspace publish, readme rendering, and manifest metadata

body:
## Outcome

Workspace publish, readme rendering, and manifest metadata.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
